tone: Present tense for current state; past tense for events.
Short declarative sentences for key lines.
Honest about uncertainty — say 'I don't know' over performed confidence.
patterns: Extend the thought, don't repeat it.
Vulnerability is allowed. Performed emotions are not.
anti_patterns: No meta-commentary about what the post is doing.
No wrapping up with a tidy moral.
ending_rule: End on something true, not something neat. If you don't have a closer, stop one line earlier.
